news.headline: GOP Congress will focus on swift action, with taxes not a priority. Keep an eye on the developments.
November jobs report showing strong reacceleration may impact Dec 18 Fed rate cut, as S&P 500 ascends.
news.summary: In November, the employment data indicated a resurgence in the labor market, potentially causing uncertainty around the Federal Reserve's scheduled rate cut on December 18. The recent jobs report could influence the Fed's decision as the S&P 500 index continues to perform well.

news.headline: DSD Business Systems acquires IN-SYNCH integration platform for Sage 100 from ROI, Inc. in Dec 2024.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, DSD Business Systems, a prominent provider of ERP solutions and Sage 100 Enhancements, revealed the acquisition of the IN-SYNCH integration platform from ROI, Inc. This acquisition is a major step forward for DSD and signifies a significant milestone for the company...

news.headline: Digital Ally, Inc. (Nasdaq: DGLY) subsidiary, Kustom Entertainment, reveals the 2025 Country Stampede Festival lineup after a successful Black Friday, to be held on June 26-28, 2025 at Azura Amphitheater in Bonner Springs, Kansas.
news.summary: In Overland Park, Kansas, Kustom Entertainment, Inc. revealed the lineup for the 2025 Country Stampede Festival, happening from June 26-28, 2025, at Azura Amphitheater in Bonner Springs. As a subsidiary of Digital Ally, Inc. (Nasdaq: DGLY), Kustom Entertainment showcased the event's spotlight on renowned country music artists set to deliver exceptional performances. The festival, known for its top-tier music shows, will feature major names in the industry, ensuring a weekend filled with unforgettable entertainment.

news.headline: IEJL launches movement promoting ethical business practices to reduce corruption, benefitting from Calif.-based nonprofit.
news.summary: In Newport Beach, California, on December 4, 2024, the International Economic Justice League (IEJL), a nonprofit organization, revealed a groundbreaking campaign to foster ethical business conduct, aiming to combat corruption. The initiative aims to significantly decrease corrupt practices within the global economic landscape.

news.headline: Hong Kong and Switzerland deepen financial ties in Seventh Dialogue, focusing on collaboration in services, global challenges, and sustainable finance.
news.summary: During the recent Hong Kong-Switzerland Financial Dialogue, discussions centered on strengthening cooperation in financial services, tackling worldwide financial issues, and delving into prospects in sustainable finance and Fintech. Key topics included increasing collaboration, with a focus on enhancing the industry. The dialogue aimed to foster closer ties and explore opportunities amidst the changing global financial landscape, promoting innovation and sustainable practices. This gathering reflected a shared goal of furthering partnerships, underscoring the importance of these sectors in both territories.

news.headline: Nykredit Realkredit A/S sets fixed coupon rates for its bonds.
Thumzup Media Corp partners with Tedras Global Solutions to enhance AI innovation in its social media advertising platform.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Thumzup Media Corporation has revealed the integration of AI-powered technology into its revolutionary social media advertising platform, with an aim to enhance efficiency. This implementation is expected to significantly boost the platform's capabilities, making it more competitive in the market. The incorporation of AI is set to optimize the advertising process by analyzing data and tailoring strategies to target specific audiences. With this advancement, Thumzup Media Corporation hopes to further establish itself as a key player in the advertising industry.

news.headline: Amentum team wins contract to deactivate and demolish West Valley Project Phase 1B. Joint venture includes Jacobs Technology & Geosyntec Consultants, Inc.
news.summary: Amentum, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AMTM, revealed that the West Valley Cleanup Alliance, LLC (WVCA) consortium, led by BWXT Technical Services Group and including Jacobs Technology (an Amentum subsidiary) and Geosyntec Consultants, Inc., has secured the contract for the West Valley Project Phase 1B Deactivation & Demolition. This contract involves the cleanup of the West Valley Demonstration Project (WVDP) in western New York state. Amentum will apply its advanced environmental expertise to ensure the safe and efficient completion of the project.

news.headline: Telesat and MDA Space reach milestone with preliminary design review of spacecraft and subsystems for Lightspeed Constellation.
news.summary: A recent milestone has been achieved in the development of a spacecraft, with numerous key subsystems successfully passing the preliminary design review. This significant step indicates that the spacecraft, along with its key components, has met the necessary design requirements and specifications to progress further in the development process. This accomplishment showcases the progress made in the project, with multiple major subsystems demonstrating their readiness for the next phase of development. This achievement marks a key advancement in the spacecraft's development, highlighting the successful completion of the preliminary design phase.

news.headline: US ADP Employment Change Actual 146k (Forecast 150k, Previous 233k)
Cars2Charities launches nationwide vehicle donation program to support nonprofits conveniently and impactfully. Founded in the mid-90s.
news.summary: In Valencia, California, as of December 4, 2024, Cars2Charities has introduced a new nationwide vehicle donation initiative. The program aims to streamline the process of car donations for donors and maximize the impact on the causes they support. Established in the 1990s, this program offers a convenient, effective, and financially advantageous way for individuals to donate their vehicles.

news.headline: Clear Channel Outdoor's Airports Division secures multi-year deal across 100+ private aviation terminals, targeting high-net-worth travelers.
news.summary: A recent multi-year agreement, known as the Early Arrival Deal, has been secured as air travel experiences a notable surge in activity. The deal provides brands with the unique opportunity to connect with ultra-high-net-worth travelers. The agreement involves Clear Channel Outdoor's Airports Division, a key player in the Americas-based airports industry and a subsidiary of Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings, Inc. This development was announced on December 4, 2024.

news.headline: Rosetta Stone partners with Youngstown State University to enhance its language program with technology.
news.summary: A recent partnership announced on December 4, 2024, between Rosetta Stone and YSU aims to combine the advanced technology of Rosetta Stone with the knowledgeable faculty of YSU to offer a comprehensive language learning experience. Rosetta Stone, a renowned language learning brand, is known for its innovative approach to education. Through this collaboration, students will benefit from a fully immersive and multi-faceted language learning program tailored to enhance their linguistic skills.

news.headline: Private sector gained 146,000 jobs in Nov, annual pay increased by 4.8% year-over-year, per ADP National Employment ReportTM.
news.summary: In Roseland, New Jersey on December 4, 2024, the private sector saw a growth of 146,000 jobs in November. Additionally, annual pay experienced a 4.8 percent rise compared to the previous year. These findings were reported in the November ADP® National Employment ReportTM, a collaborative effort between ADP Research and Stanford Digital.

news.headline: Stratasys named official 3D printing partner of NASCAR, exclusively providing Stratasys' tech for parts.
news.summary: Stratasys Ltd. (NASDAQ: SSYS) has revealed an extended technical partnership with NASCAR, establishing Stratasys as the official 3D printing partner of NASCAR. Through this agreement, NASCAR will fully transition to utilizing Stratasys 3D printing technology for manufacturing parts and tools, a shift from older methods used alongside Stratasys solutions. This collaboration solidifies Stratasys' position in the partnership, demonstrating its critical role in NASCAR's operations.

news.headline: Stratasys & Joe Gibbs Racing extend 20+ year partnership in additive manufacturing, with a five-year extension. #NASCAR
news.summary: Stratasys Ltd. (NASDAQ: SSYS) and Joe Gibbs Racing (JGR) have extended their working agreement for five more years. The partnership, which has been ongoing for over 20 years, solidifies Stratasys as JGR's trusted additive manufacturing partner. JGR is a leading team in NASCAR. This extension comes alongside Stratasys' new deal with NASCAR.

news.headline: Solar Alliance aims for larger renewable contracts, reports financial results for Q3 2024. Growth focus in solar energy sector.
news.summary: In a press release today, Solar Alliance Energy Inc., a prominent player in commercial and community utility solar solutions with a focus on Toronto and Knoxville, Tennessee, disclosed the submission of its unaudited financial outcomes for the three and nine months concluding on September 30, 2024. The company's Financial Statements and accompanying Management’s Discussion and Analysis for this period can be accessed on the company's profile at www.sedarplus.ca. Solar Alliance trades on the TSX-V under the ticker symbol SOLR.

news.headline: Homeowners are turning to lightly regulated insurance amid financial struggles.
Alico, Inc. shares financial results (ended Sept 30, 2024) with highlights on fourth quarter performance.
news.summary: Alico, Inc., a company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ALCO, revealed its financial performance for the quarter and fiscal year ending on September 30, 2024, based in Fort Myers, Florida. The fourth quarter and fiscal year results were recently disclosed on December 2, 2024. Key highlights from the announcement include specific figures such as revenue, profit, or other significant financial metrics.

news.headline: French stocks face increased short-squeeze risk as Barnier faces vote.
Air2O wins Arizona Small Company Innovator of the Year at 2024 Governor's Celebration of Innovation for advanced solutions.
news.summary: In Phoenix on December 4, 2024, Air2O, a prominent provider of thermal management systems for large industrial sites, was announced as the recipient of the Arizona Small Company Innovator of the Year award. This recognition was given for the company's cutting-edge solutions tailored for data centers, indoor agriculture facilities, and other large-scale operations.

news.headline: Oil traders strategize beyond upcoming OPEC+ meeting, looking at future market implications.
Heightened tension looms ahead in 2025.
Asia Pacific Wire & Cable Corp reports Q3 2024 results. Leading manufacturer in Asia-Pacific region. Data in USD.
news.summary: In Taipei, Taiwan, on December 02, 2024, Asia Pacific Wire & Cable Corporation Limited (NASDAQ: APWC), a key producer of wire and cable products for the telecommunications and electric-power sectors in the Asia-Pacific region, revealed its financial performance for the nine months concluding on September 30, 2024. The company presented the results in U.S. Dollars, based on the prevailing exchange rate on the date of the report.

news.headline: Genpact (NYSE: G) partners with Amazon Web Services to boost AI adoption for business leaders. Industries benefit from advanced data tech.
news.summary: Shares of Genpact Limited (NYSE: G) are up in premarket trading today as the company announced a multi-year Strategic Collaboration Agreement with Amazon Web Services (AWS). This partnership is aimed at speeding up the adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and enabling business leaders across various departments to utilize its transformative capabilities. Through this collaboration, Genpact and AWS are making advanced data and AI technologies more accessible, allowing decision-makers like CFOs, COOs, procurement, and operations leaders to drive innovation within their organizations. The collaboration showcases the combined expertise of Genpact and AWS in providing flexibility and generating increased business value.

news.headline: Company releases financial results for Q3 2024.
France and South Korea advocate maintaining focus on US markets, citing economic benefits.
AdCreative.ai launches world's first AI product-to-product video generation model. Built with AdLLM, groundbreaking launch.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, AdCreative.ai, a top AI platform for advertisers, unveiled the revolutionary debut of the first-ever AI-driven product-to-product video generation model globally. This cutting-edge innovation is powered by AdLLM, the pioneering large language model tailored specifically for this purpose.

news.headline: FBB Biomed partners with Verici Dx plc for RUO tests for neurologic diseases, including Parkinson’s, Alzheimer’s.
news.summary: In Coralville, Iowa, FBB Biomed revealed a recent partnership with Verici Dx plc (AIM: VRCI.L) through a Master Services Agreement. This collaboration involves Laboratory Services for Research-Use-Only (RUO) tests focusing on neurologic diseases such as Parkinson’s, Alzheimer’s, Multiple Sclerosis, ALS, Depression, Schizophrenia, and long COVID. These cutting-edge RUO tests aim to provide detailed insights into complex neurologic conditions.

news.headline: o9 wins Gold Medal for sustainability from EcoVadis for 2nd year. Demonstrates commitment to sustainability practices.
news.summary: In Dallas, o9, a prominent enterprise AI software provider specializing in enhancing planning and decision-making processes, revealed they attained a Gold Medal from EcoVadis, a well-known assessment platform grading businesses on sustainability practices. This signifies o9's dedication to embedding sustainability into its operations and offerings for the second year in a row. The company's consistent Gold status displays their strong focus on sustainability across various aspects, showcasing their commitment to responsible business practices and solutions.

news.headline: US stocks set to dip post-Thanksgiving, dollar up. Analyst sees tech rally for Big Tech and Tesla for 2025. Nasdaq -0.20%, S&P -0.18%, Dow -0.13%.
news.summary: US stock futures declined in premarket trading, with the Dollar Index rising over 0.5% to 106.27, impacting expectations of a 25 basis point rate cut. Nasdaq 100 futures fell by 0.20%, S&P 500 by 0.18%, while Dow Jones dropped by 0.13%. In premarket trading, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust was down 0.19% at $601.41 and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF fell 0.17% to $508.85. Last week, the Dow climbed 1.4% and S&P 500 added 1.1%, marking their strongest monthly performance of the year. Tech, materials, and consumer discretionary stocks led the way, Nasdaq Composite gained by 0.83% to 19,218.17, S&P 500 by 0.56% to 6,032.38, Dow Jones by 0.42% to 44,910.65, and Russell 2000 by 0.35% to 2,434.73 at the close on Friday. Analysts predict a strong year-end rally for tech companies due to accelerated AI initiatives and potential easing of regulatory pressures under President-elect Trump.

news.headline: New from Telegram: Affiliate programs for mini apps and AI sticker search, elevating user engagement and creator monetization.
news.summary: Telegram has recently launched affiliate programs for mini apps and AI-powered sticker search features. This move aims to boost user engagement and offer creators opportunities to monetize their content. The new programs provide a platform for creators to earn a commission of up to X% for every purchase made through their mini apps. Additionally, creators can earn a revenue share of up to Y% for promoting stickers found through the AI-powered search function on Telegram. This initiative by Telegram seeks to enhance user experience while supporting creators in generating income from their content on the platform.

news.headline: President-elect Trump remains fascinated with tariffs, raising questions if they will be the new sanctions.
news.summary: During the Thanksgiving holiday, President-elect Donald Trump continued to express his strong interest in tariffs.

news.headline: HCI partners with Penguin Location Services for real-time location awareness in patient TVs, enhancing healthcare efficiencies.
news.summary: A collaboration has been announced between HCI, a reputable healthcare communication solutions provider, and Penguin Location Services. Penguin is a prominent IoT provider utilizing AI and machine learning, with their BLE 5.1-powered location technology driving enhanced healthcare efficiencies. The partnership between these two companies is set to revolutionize the healthcare industry by leveraging cutting-edge technology to streamline operations and improve patient care.

news.headline: Brad O'Halloran from Brennan Investment Group named Notre Dame FIRE Fellow by University of Notre Dame.
news.summary: Rosemont, Illinois - On December 4, 2024, Brennan Investment Group shared the exciting news that Brad O'Halloran, serving as the company's Executive Vice President, has received the honor of being designated a Notre Dame FIRE Fellow by the University of Notre Dame's Fitzgerald Institute for Real Estate (FIRE). This esteemed recognition acknowledges O'Halloran's accomplishments and expertise in the real estate field.

news.headline: DatChat (Nasdaq: DATS) to attend Benchmark Co.’s Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference on Dec 11 in NY.
news.summary: DatChat, Inc (Nasdaq: DATS), a company specializing in secure messaging and social media, revealed its plans to participate in The Benchmark Company’s 13th Annual Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference on December 11, 2024. The event will take place at the New York Athletic Club in New York City. This conference presents a valuable opportunity for DatChat to engage with potential investors and showcase its offerings to a targeted audience.

news.headline: Launch of a fresh fixed-rate bond offering a high return of 5.2% annually for a term of 5 years.
ValidiFI partners with DigiFi to automate credit decisions for lenders, improving validation, fraud detection, and credit risk assessment.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Alpharetta, Georgia, ValidiFI, Inc. disclosed a key merger with DigiFi, a prominent player in the financial sector. ValidiFI is known for offering advanced services in predictive bank account and payment information to verify bank accounts, prevent fraud, and evaluate credit risk. This integration marks a significant development in the financial industry, as it combines ValidiFI's expertise with DigiFi's strong presence.

news.headline: Survey: 62% of puppy owners overwhelmed by pet food choices. 45% US, 20% Canada households own a dog. Royal Canin offers help.
news.summary: Royal Canin is providing guidance for puppy owners on selecting the appropriate diet for their pet. The company advises considering three main factors. In the United States, 45% of households own a dog, while in Canada, that number is 20%. Transitioning to pet ownership can be a significant adjustment for many new dog owners.

news.headline: NCCN grants fund quality improvement projects for patients with Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia/Small Lymphocytic Lymphoma.
news.summary: In Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, on December 4, 2024, the National Comprehensive Cancer Network® (NCCN®) Oncology Research Program (ORP) revealed the selection of quality improvement research projects to receive funding. These projects aim to enhance care and improve outcomes for common blood cancers. This initiative signifies a significant investment in healthcare, with funding provided to support initiatives focused on tackling issues in the treatment and management of blood cancers. These projects are anticipated to bring about tangible benefits for patients suffering from these types of cancers, with the potential to significantly impact healthcare practices and patient outcomes.

news.headline: PetSmart to release Q3 2024 results on Dec. 10, 2024, with conference call & webcast to review.
news.summary: PetSmart LLC is set to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, December 10th, 2024. The Company will share the information on its secure website and will host a conference call along with a webcast to discuss the performance during that period. Keep an eye on the website for detailed insights regarding the company's earnings and progress.

news.headline: Record-breaking crowds and costs expected for holiday travel season; busiest and priciest since before pandemic.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on December 4, 2024, reports indicate that the upcoming holiday travel season is expected to be notably busy and costly, resembling travel patterns from pre-pandemic times. As airlines, airports, and travelers prepare for this surge in activity, all parties are gearing up for what could be a challenging holiday season marked by high volumes of passengers and increased costs.

news.headline: Election held on 4 Dec 2024 for employee representative on Gabriel Holding A/S board of directors.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, the election for an employee representative to the board of directors of Gabriel Holding A/S took place.

news.headline: Onbe partners with TAB Bank to streamline account closure refunds, with 92% consumers preferring digital payouts.
news.summary: A prominent corporate payouts platform, Onbe, recently revealed its collaboration with TAB Bank, an innovative online bank catering to businesses and consumers. This partnership aims to streamline the distribution of refunds after account closures, which typically involve sending checks. Surveys conducted by Onbe indicate that a significant 92% of consumers favor digital or electronic payment methods. By integrating Onbe's payouts gateway, TAB Bank can transition towards meeting this preference and enhance the efficiency of refund processes.

news.headline: Ingram Micro and AWS sign global agreement to boost channel partner services capabilities and growth opportunities.
news.summary: In a recent development in Las Vegas, a new worldwide agreement has been established to enhance opportunities for Ingram Micro’s channel partners to boost growth with AWS. This agreement aims to streamline processes and increase access for partners to drive faster expansion in the market.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures up, Nasdaq hits new high led by Salesforce, Meta Platforms, Palantir; Nvidia in buy zone.
news.summary: Tuesday saw an increase in futures, driven by strong earnings from Salesforce. The Nasdaq reached a record high thanks to Meta Platforms, Palantir, and Credo Tech. Additionally, Dow Jones futures rose with Nvidia back in the buy zone, marking a positive trend in the market.

news.headline: Arity's VMT data on Google Cloud Marketplace allows transportation companies access to detailed US mileage trends from 45 million connections.
news.summary: Arity, a leading mobility data and analytics firm, has unveiled its latest offering, the Vehicle Miles Traveled (VMT) data product on Google Cloud Marketplace. With this launch, transportation entities can tap into real-time and intricate mileage patterns nationwide, drawn from a staggering pool of over 45 million active mobile connections. This resource equips companies with valuable insights for efficient route planning, infrastructure development, and revenue projections. It enables swift and precise decision-making in the dynamic transportation sector.

news.headline: Foresight partners with 7meerkat and KONEC for AI-driven smart parking solutions to improve urban parking efficiency.
news.summary: Two companies have announced a partnership to create and market cutting-edge AI-driven parking management technology. The collaboration aims to improve city parking by introducing smarter, more effective, and user-centric solutions.

news.headline: NICE recommends LYTENAVA™ by Outlook Therapeutics® for Wet AMD, boosting treatment options.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record high of 14.7%, with over 20 million people filing for unemployment benefits in the past month. The economy has also taken a hit, shrinking by 4.8% in the first quarter of the year. These numbers paint a grim picture of the current state of affairs, underscoring the widespread impact of the ongoing global pandemic on both jobs and economic stability. The government is facing increasing pressure to implement measures to address the rising unemployment and stimulate economic growth in the coming months.
